title: Crispy Algerian Chicken
description: A delicious and spicy Algerian-inspired dish with crispy chicken, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with a combination of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and Algerian spice blend.
Dip the chicken in the Panko breadcrumbs or crushed crackers, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat the xtra virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated chicken breast and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast the roast in a small dry skillet over medium heat, until fragrant.
Serve the crispy chicken breast with toasted roast, lemon wedges, and your favorite sides.
